Harvest Table Culinary Group relies on our vendors' allergy warnings and ingredient listings. Because we operate a commercial kitchen where ingredient substitutions, recipe revisions and cross-contact with allergens is possible, Harvest Table Culinary Group cannot guarantee that any food item will be completely free of allergens.
